text.title: Contract-First Development Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for contract-first-development.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the API have multiple consumers AND need stable versioned contracts?

conclusion.verdict: SKIP — contract-first overhead exceeds value for single-team internal tools
SKIP — different contract surface (SDL or .proto); use the protocol's native tooling
BLOCK — fix spectral errors before review
BLOCK — declare and document breaking change, bump MAJOR
BLOCK — revert hand-edits, change spec and regenerate
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: consumers=3, protocol=REST → first three branches do not match → spectral clean + diff clean → all_gates_green=true → run-the-checklist → APPROVE.
